The BF3 counter was of a cylindrical type, 50 mm
in effective length, 12 mm in diameter with a gas
pressure of 1 atm and high-voltage bias of 1100 V.
.Sample prepared by mass separator. 243Am content is
dissolved in a mixture of 0.1 ml concentrated nitric
acid and 1 ml of ethyl alcohol. 243Am layer was
prepared by electrodeposition method. Number of 243Am
is (3.33+-0.05)E+17 atoms on stainless steel backing.
.235-U sample has isotopic purity 99.91%, number of
